TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Hadur, title = Hadur, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hadur} }

S.FORM: hadur hadur sun o quri kingal na hi paru bi uqan Truku sbiyaw.
S.PHON: ħaduɾ ħaduɾ sun o quɾi kiŋal na ħi paɾu bi uqan tɾuku sbijaw.
S.FORM: hadur hadur sun o quri kingal na hi paru bi uqan Truku sbiyaw.
S.PHON: ħaduɾ ħaduɾ sun o quɾi kiŋal na ħi paɾu bi uqan tɾuku sbijaw.
